allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; try { $b = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/references/statuses" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer x"} -UseBasicParsing -EA Stop; "Backend: OK \($\($b.StatusCode\)\)" } catch { "Backend: HTTP $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.Value__\)" }; try { $f = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5174" -UseBasicParsing -EA Stop; "Frontend: OK \($\($f.StatusCode\)\)" } catch { "Frontend: Error - $_" })

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Start-Process -FilePath "cmd" -ArgumentList "/k","cd /d `"C:\\Users\\4123\\Desktop\\Документы\\dipl\\GazAvtoMaster\\.claude\\worktrees\\upbeat-galileo-dbee7e\\frontend`" && npm run dev" -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173" -UseBasicParsing -EA Stop | Out-Null; "Frontend: OK" } catch { "Error: $_" })
